final:
module top_module(
                  input signed [31:0] inp,
                  input [4:0]         shamt,
                  input               isSrl,
                  output [31:0]       out
                  wire __out_tmp = (isSrl)? $signed(inp>>shamt):
                (inp>>>shamt);
                  assign out = __out_tmp;

endmodule
